verdict_reason: All deliverables created successfully with comprehensive schemas, validator tool, and documentation

deliverables.description: Developer agent output schema - enforces test_results, compilation_success
QA agent output schema - enforces test results, pass_rate ≥90%, evidence
Code reviewer agent output schema - enforces findings, severity_counts
Security architect agent output schema - enforces vulnerabilities, risk_score
DevOps agent output schema - enforces deployment_status, health_checks
CLI tool to validate agent outputs against schemas
deliverables.validation: Executable script using Zod for schema validation, supports 10+ agent types

deliverables.description: Comprehensive guide for using schema validation system
deliverables.validation: Explains schemas, validator tool, integration patterns, 350+ lines

deliverables.description: Implementation report documenting system design and deliverables
Quick reference card for common validation commands

success_criteria.description: Agent output schemas created for 10+ agent types
success_criteria.evidence: Created 10 schemas: developer, qa, code-reviewer, security-architect, devops, technical-writer, architect, analyst, planner, performance-engineer

success_criteria.description: Each schema enforces evidence fields (not just claims)
success_criteria.evidence: All schemas require verdict + evidence fields. Developer requires test_results, QA requires evidence.test_output, Security requires vulnerability scan results, etc.

success_criteria.description: Schema validator tool created and executable
success_criteria.evidence: Created .claude/tools/schema-validator.mjs with CLI interface, agent-type mapping, strict mode, verbose mode

success_criteria.description: Validator uses Zod for JSON Schema Draft 07 validation
success_criteria.evidence: Validator imports OutputValidator from output-validator.mjs which uses Zod 4.0 for schema conversion and validation

success_criteria.description: Documentation explains schema system and usage
success_criteria.evidence: Created SCHEMA_VALIDATION_GUIDE.md with 350+ lines covering quick start, agent schemas, evidence requirements, workflow integration, troubleshooting, FAQ

success_criteria.description: Schemas enforce: verdicts, evidence, deliverables, metrics
success_criteria.evidence: All schemas enforce verdict field with enum values, evidence/proof fields, deliverables arrays, agent-specific metrics (test_results, coverage, findings, etc.)
Documentation includes workflow YAML integration pattern, orchestrator verification pattern, programmatic validation examples (Node.js, Python)

validation_results.test_coverage: Manual testing performed for schema validator CLI

before.false_positives: High - agents claim success without proof

after.verification: Automated - CLI tool with exit codes for CI/CD
